creator: ali.abdallah@suse.com
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #19)

# nvmecontrol identify nvme0ns1
...
LBA Format #00: Data Size:   512  Metadata Size:     0  Performance: Best

So it is 512. I'm okay with what I'm getting right now, it feel already much faster than before.

Thank you for your great support! And please feel free to close this as invalid at your earlier convenience.
